chart.title: Forest area
chart.subtitle: Forest area is land under natural or planted stands of trees able to reach at least five meters in height in situ, whether productive or not, and excludes tree stands in agricultural production systems.
chart.citation: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025)

Forest area.descriptionShort: Forest area is land under natural or planted stands of trees of at least 5 meters in situ, whether productive or not, and excludes tree stands in agricultural production systems.
Forest area.descriptionProcessing: Annual forest area values are linearly interpolated for missing years, based on available data points from the FAO Forest Resources Assessment (FRA) reports.
Forest area.citationShort: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data
Forest area.citationLong: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (2025) – with major processing by Our World in Data. “Forest area” [dataset]. Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations, “Global Forest Resources Assessment 2025” [original data].
